no-restricted-syntax.message: DRY guard rail: import HEADER_USER_ID from '@/lib/headers' instead of inlining the 'x-user-id' header literal.
DRY guard rail: import HEADER_ACCESS_SCOPE from '@/lib/headers' instead of inlining the 'x-access-scope' header literal.
DRY guard rail: import HEADER_TRACE_ID from '@/lib/headers' instead of inlining the 'x-trace-id' header literal.
DRY guard rail: import ADMIN_SCOPE from '@/lib/auth' (or use requireAdminScope/hasAdminScope) instead of inlining the 0x04 admin-scope bit.
